name: MCDGetECUParam
title: MCDGetECUParam
syntax: long MCDGetECUParam ( char moduleName[], char parameterName[], int format)
description: Reading of a parameter. The read parameter value will be available in the MCDParamResponse callback handler.

parameters.name: ModuleName
parameters.description: Name of the module that is configured in the global options dialog External Programs|MCD 3D Server.
